title: Application of Part IIA
content:
(1)	
Subject to any agreement to the contrary and to subsection 
(2), this Part shall apply to an employee employed under 
a continuous contract if an end of year payment is payable 
by the employer to that employee by virtue of a term or 
condition (whether written or oral, express or implied) of the 
contract of employment.
	
(2)	
In the case of an employee to whom this Part applies, any 
term or condition of the contract of employment which 
purports to prevent the payment under section 11F of a 
proportion of the end of year payment shall be void.
